idle.title: One-time encrypted session
idle.desc1: Pair two devices with a short code; send text and files both ways.
idle.desc2: Closing the app destroys everything — no accounts, no history.

allocator.title: Send
allocator.instr1: Share this short code over a trusted channel (phone, in person, Signal, …).
allocator.instr2: Don't send the code and the content over the same channel.

joiner.title: Receive
joiner.subtitle: Enter the code your peer gave you
joiner.invalidCode: Wrong code. Please check and re-enter.

connecting.title: Connecting
connecting.desc: Code matched. Establishing an encrypted channel with the peer; this usually takes only a few seconds.

session.composerPlaceholder: Type a message or drop a file…
session.confirmCloseDesc: Closing the session is irreversible; all in-flight transfers will be lost.

error.descPake: Please check the code and try again, or ask your peer to generate a new one. Codes are case-sensitive and single-use.
error.descConnection: The session ended. Please generate a new code and retry.
error.descExpired: Codes expire 5 minutes after generation if unused. Please generate a new one.

composer.placeholder: Type a message or drop a file…

fileCard.execWarn: This is an executable file. Only accept if you trust the sender.
fileCard.incomingOffer: Peer wants to send a file
fileCard.awaiting: Offer sent; waiting for the peer to accept…

settings.title: Settings
settings.downloadDirHint: Received files are timestamped to avoid overwrites.
settings.autoAcceptHint: Disabled in this build — every transfer needs a manual confirmation to avoid silent drops of malicious carriers (.lnk / .hta / .iso / macro docs, …).
settings.numericCodeHint: Example: 15-123-456. Slightly weaker than the word list but easier to read aloud; takes effect on the next session.
settings.languageHint: Takes effect immediately; error messages in new sessions use the new language after restart.
settings.relayHint: Leave blank to use the built-in default. Both peers must point at the same mailbox to meet.

update.portableHint: Portable build will replace the current exe
update.notRestartedError: Update downloaded but the app did not auto-restart
